title: Legacy Mod Menu
description: A port of Mod Menu to Legacy Fabric / Legacy Rewoven
body:
This is a port of [Mod Menu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modmenu) to Legacy Fabric.

 

Adds a screen for viewing a list of installed mods.

- The menu is searchable and sortable, libraries can be hidden.
- Client-side and API mods are marked with a special badge in the list.
- When clicking a mod in the list, its homepage, issues link and description are displayed.
- The mod details page also lets the user configure the mod, if available.


Requires [Legacy Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legacy-fabric-api/files/3099543) version 1.0.0 or above
